data.body:
=== EPIC STATUS / HANDOFF (session pause) ===
Worktree: .claude/worktrees/foliaged-merry-collie, branch worktree-foliaged-merry-collie, ff'd to origin/main c005f242b then 4 stack commits on top. venv + pre-commit + Gerrit commit-msg hooks installed. Identity RebarBotNava <joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com>.

DONE (4/8) — implemented, unit-tested, committed; pre-commit lint+mypy green; plan-review PASS+signed; NOT closed (close deferred to Gerrit Verified per CLAUDE.local.md):
  a23963ca3  #4 spangly-beggarly-blackrhino  (G5 deterministic decomposition signal)
  29d9fa863  #1 fishable-apivorous-redhead    (plan-review MAX impact + per-gate impact_fn seam)
  068ba1842  #2 disused-unpoliced-solenodon   (Pass-1 recall via post-Pass-1 candidates)
  23581b171  #5 usable-chattery-coelacanth    (threshold/posture recalibration)  <- stack TIP

TODO (4/8), all still OPEN:
  #6 albite-lazy-barb   — plan fully specified + remediated to 0-or-1 blocks; round-6 stack-grounded review in flight (job tmp rp_codeimpact6.txt). Ready to claim+implement.
  #7 grusome-uncheerful-nematode — plan needs mechanism rewrite; detector needs a BESPOKE seam (see its comment); recommend splitting off the detector as discovered_from.
  #8 limestone-unethical-zebrafinch — infra + change-scoped code_review artifact; the on-box PAT-push canary is a deploy step (un-verifiable here).
  #3 raptorial-galloping-dragon — rollout + calibration; depends on #1/#6/#8; implement LAST.

CRITICAL GOTCHA (stacked-review grounding): plan-review/completion gates ground against a snapshot of REBAR_GATE_REF>[snapshot].ref>origin/main. Default origin/main does NOT contain my stack, so children referencing prior-stack symbols (e.g. #6 uses impact_fn from #1) get FALSE 'symbol absent' BLOCKS. FIX: run each stacked child's review AND claim (and later completion-verify/close) with REBAR_GATE_REF=<current stack tip SHA> (attested+signable). Use the SAME ref for a child's review and its claim (verified_at_sha must equal current at claim). #7 is stack-independent (ground vs origin/main, no REBAR_GATE_REF).

Durable trail: session_log 'speedful-healthful-beagle' has the full blow-by-blow incl. each child's design + the gate findings caught (ADR-0008 independence violation, trigger_likelihood collision, grep-ast fabrication). Each child ticket has a STATUS(handoff) comment.
